name: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc.
description: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. is a leading American beverage and coffee company formed in 2018 through the merger of Keurig Green Mountain and Dr Pepper Snapple Group. The company operates a diverse portfolio of iconic brands, including Dr Pepper, Keurig, Canada Dry, Snapple, and Green Mountain Coffee Roasters. With a unique integrated business model that combines hot and cold beverage systems, Keurig Dr Pepper serves consumers across North America through a robust distribution network, focusing on innovation and sustainability to deliver high-quality beverages for every occasion.
